reviews.review_description: Only picked this up because it had Quest Achievements, but so glad I did. Spent the last few days grinding the Achievements and had a blast! A great platformer that takes the Flappy Bird mechanics and applies them to 3d levels. The progression is fantastic with a frog character that can only hop later on. Hope to see more from this dev.

I love this game so much, it's so sweet and cosy. I've not played many cosy games on VR, so it was such a welcome new experience!! It's really unique and combines stuff like flappy bird with a more 3D Mario-like environment! Perfect game for people who like a puzzle, who like birds, and who just like cute things! ❤️‍🩹

reviews.review_title: Thank you hazbean for letting me review
reviews.review_description: This was so good that i decided to give this a five star review thanks to haz bean for giving me the free key to the game i was able to have fun and test the game it was a very good game especially wuth all the different levels it was very challenging but not to challenging this is definatly good for or headsets thank you for letting me review the game for free
I think this game will do pretty well, because it's pretty addictive to play and I can't wait to see what the game turns into when it becomes published to the public
This game is a fun platform game
Really nice unique gameplay I've seen

This game is overall well done and fun to play, but my favorite aspect is the leaderboards. It’s really fun to try and get number 1 and collect the strawberries as fast as possible. I’m not too far into the game, but I know it will be fun so the way through based off of what I have gotten to play.

It's a game about collecting items quickly with the ability to scale the entire game to your liking (rotation and size). If it gets a built in level editor it will have solid replayability. As for now I beat it (all stars and coconuts) in one headset charge (almost)

reviews.review_title: This game is such an amazing concept
reviews.review_description: Running around doing levels in a birds eye view could not be better, something about this game is so amazing and fun, 10/10 I recommend buying
